description: Filter Documentation & Validation — Enhance tool descriptions with valid filter keys, add client-side validation, convenience params
constraints: Follow existing 3-layer pattern: MCP Tool → Service → API
Use Zod schemas as plain objects (not z.object()), matching existing tools
All tools must be registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Vendor media types required for all API calls (Accept + Content-Type headers)
deno task check && deno task lint && deno fmt --check must all pass
Filter validation is advisory — warn but do not block if a key is unknown (API may add new keys)
RSQL key extraction uses simple regex, not a full parser
nonGoals: Changing the Polaris API's filter behavior

glossary.RSQL: REST query language used by Polaris for filter parameters. Operators: == != =in=() =out=(). Logical: ; (AND), , (OR)
glossary.filter namespace: Prefix used in Findings API filters: occurrence:, triage:, context:, type:, special:
glossary.convenience parameter: A tool-level parameter that auto-generates RSQL filter syntax (e.g., name param generates name=='value')
glossary.triage exclusivity: API rule that dismissal-reason and status cannot be set together; is-dismissed is read-only

userStories.title: Create filter validation utility
userStories.description: Create src/mcp/filter-validation.ts with FILTER_KEYS registry, extractFilterKeys(), and validateFilter() functions.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/filter-validation.ts exports FILTER_KEYS: Record<string, string[]> mapping resource types to valid RSQL keys

FILTER_KEYS includes entries for: portfolio.applications, portfolio.projects, portfolio.branches, findings.issues, findings.occurrences, tests, bugtracking.configurations, bugtracking.external_projects, bugtracking.project_mappings
Exports extractFilterKeys(filter: string): string[] that extracts left-hand side keys from RSQL expressions using regex
Exports validateFilter(filter: string, resourceType: string): string | null — returns null if valid, error message with valid keys if invalid
validateFilter returns null for unknown resource types (no validation available)
Typecheck passes: deno task check
userStories.notes: Implementation complete. Verification commands could not be run due to lack of Deno in environment, but code follows spec and existing patterns.

hints: Portfolio tools use bare keys: name, description, subItemType, inTrash
Findings tools use namespaced keys: occurrence:severity, context:tool-type, special:delta, triage:status
Tests use bare keys: projectId, branchId, status, assessmentType, scanMode, testMode
Bug tracking uses bare keys: type, url, enabled (configs); key, name (external projects)

userStories.title: Enhance Portfolio tool filter descriptions + convenience params
userStories.description: Update filter descriptions on all Portfolio tools with valid keys and examples. Add name convenience parameter to get_applications and get_projects.
acceptanceCriteria: get_applications filter description lists valid keys: name, description, subscriptionType, inTrash with examples
get_applications has new name parameter: z.string().optional().describe('Filter by application name (exact match). Equivalent to filter="name==\'value\'"')
get_applications handler builds RSQL from name param and combines with filter via ; (AND)
get_projects filter description lists valid keys: name, description, subItemType, inTrash with examples
get_projects has new name parameter with same pattern as get_applications
get_projects handler builds RSQL from name param
get_branches filter description lists valid keys: name, isDefault
get_portfolio_branches filter description lists valid keys: name, isDefault, projectId, applicationId
get_labels filter description lists valid keys: name
Filter validation is called in each handler before making API calls
Typecheck passes: deno task check
userStories.notes: Implementation complete. Filter validation integrated, name convenience params added to get_applications and get_projects. Verification commands could not be run due to lack of Deno in environment, but code follows spec and existing patterns.

hints: When combining name convenience param with existing filter, join with ; (RSQL AND): const combined = filter ? `name=='${name}';${filter}` : `name=='${name}'`
Add validation early in handler: if (filter) { const error = validateFilter(filter, 'portfolio.projects'); if (error) return errorResponse(error); }

userStories.title: Enhance Findings tool filter descriptions + triage docs
userStories.description: Update all Findings tool descriptions with valid filter keys, namespace prefixes, and triage documentation. Update triage_issues description with field exclusivity rules and valid values.
acceptanceCriteria: get_issues filter description documents valid keys with namespaces: occurrence:severity, context:tool-type, special:delta, triage:status, occurrence:cwe
get_occurrences filter description documents valid keys: occurrence:issue-id, occurrence:severity, occurrence:finding-key::filePath
get_component_versions filter description documents valid keys: componentVersion:name, componentVersion:version, componentVersion:license
get_component_origins filter description documents valid keys: componentOrigin:name, componentOrigin:type
get_taxonomies filter description documents valid keys: taxonomy:name, taxonomy:standard
triage_issues tool description updated with field exclusivity rules, valid values per triage property key, and filter namespace documentation
triage_issues triage_properties schema key field describes rules: is-dismissed is read-only, status + dismissal-reason are mutually exclusive
triage_issues triage_properties value field describes valid values per key
Typecheck passes: deno task check
userStories.notes: Implementation complete. Added filter parameter to get_issues with validation. Enhanced filter descriptions for all Findings tools. Updated triage_issues with comprehensive field rules, filter namespace documentation, and triage property value guidance. Note: get_taxonomies filter documentation skipped as the API does not support filters for taxonomies. Verification commands could not be run due to lack of Deno in environment.

hints: The triage_issues description is the highest-impact change — users consistently fail on first attempts
Document confirmed working triage filter keys: occurrence:filename, occurrence:severity, occurrence:occurrence-id, triage:status, context:tool-type, type:name, special:delta
Document confirmed NOT working keys: occurrence:id (returns 0 results), bare id
Keep existing tool description content and append the new documentation sections
examples:
// Triage tool description pattern:
description: "Bulk triage security issues matching a filter. " +
  "FIELD RULES:\n" +
  "- To dismiss: use {dismissal-reason, comment} only. Status auto-sets to 'dismissed'.\n" +
  "- To change status: use {status, comment} only. Do NOT combine with dismissal-reason.\n" +
  "- NEVER set is-dismissed — it is auto-calculated.\n\n" +
  "FILTER NAMESPACES: occurrence:, triage:, context:, type:, special:"

userStories.title: Enhance Tests & Bug Tracking tool filter descriptions
userStories.description: Update filter descriptions on Tests and Bug Tracking tools with valid keys. Update create_test description with common scan patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: get_tests filter description lists valid keys: projectId, branchId, status, assessmentType, scanMode, testMode
get_bug_tracking_configurations filter description lists valid keys: type, url, enabled
get_external_projects filter description lists valid keys: key, name
get_config_project_mappings filter description lists valid keys: configurationId, projectId, btsProjectKey
create_test tool description updated with common scan patterns: 'Run a scan' → ['SAST', 'SCA'], 'Static analysis' → ['SAST'], 'Dependency scan' → ['SCA'], 'Web app scan' → ['DAST']
create_test assessment_types description updated to recommend ['SAST', 'SCA'] as default for generic 'scan' requests
Filter validation integrated into handlers where applicable
Typecheck passes: deno task check
userStories.notes: Implementation complete. Enhanced filter descriptions for all Tests and Bug Tracking tools. Added filter parameter to get_config_project_mappings with full support across API, service, and tool layers. Updated create_test with common scan pattern guidance. Verification commands could not be run due to lack of Deno in environment, but code follows spec and existing patterns.

hints: create_test already has detailed assessment type documentation — enhance, don't replace
The scan pattern guidance is a description-only change, no handler logic change needed for create_test

userStories.title: Add triage property validation to triage_issues tool
userStories.description: Add client-side pre-call validation to triage_issues handler: reject is-dismissed (read-only), reject status + dismissal-reason combo.
acceptanceCriteria: triage_issues handler validates triage_properties before calling API
Returns errorResponse if is-dismissed key is present: explains it is auto-calculated, suggests using dismissal-reason instead
Returns errorResponse if both status and dismissal-reason keys are present: explains mutual exclusion, provides correct patterns
Validation errors use errorResponse() with clear guidance messages
Valid combinations pass through to API call unchanged
Typecheck passes: deno task check
deno task lint passes
deno fmt --check passes

hints: Add validation at the start of the handler, before the API call
Check keys.includes('is-dismissed') first, then check for status + dismissal-reason combination
Import errorResponse from ../types.ts if not already imported
